text:
The Mandragora (マンドラゴラ, Mandoragora) is a type of Magical Beast that's native to Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Mandragora is part of the Wollow Forest fauna and drops the Mandragora Meat that is requested by the Gourmet Hunter Menchi for her sidequest.
